rawAssistant: A trip to the marsh, eh? That's a treacherous journey indeed. For such a venture, I'd recommend my Antidote potion. It's a tried-and-true remedy for poison affliction. I also have some sturdy stitching kits that might come in handy on your travels. My road-proof twine could be useful as well – it'll help keep your gear secure against the elements and any would-be thieves.
